creator: fredantispam@free.fr
text:
USB HP printer is not detected by kernel when ACPI enabled.
If ACPI disabled, USB printer is well detected, but freebsd
does not boot anymore because HDD (Maxtor on nvidia SATA chipset)
is not detected.

From dmesg output:

SMP: AP CPU #1 Launched!

Please note that if I plug a USB stick (Kingston DataTraveler) on the USB port
used by my HP printer, it works fine.

Also please note that this HP printer (1320) works fine with cups on my linux box.

Fix: 

Don't know :-(
How-To-Repeat: Does not work on Asus P5ND2-SLI Deluxe mobo.
